title: Cattleyopsis holdridgei
taxonomy: Cattleyopsis holdridgei is classified within the orchid family (Orchidaceae), specifically within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This species is further classified within the tribe Cymbidieae and the genus Cattleyopsis. The tribe Cymbidieae is a large and diverse group of orchids, often referred to as the "boat-pumpkin orchids." Cattleyopsis holdridgei is native to Central America and is often found in shaded, humid environments. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Cattleyopsis holdridgei shares characteristics with other orchid species, such as having modified roots for absorption and producing showy flowers.
